resources.string: ARCore depth, intrinsics, and snapshot export
ARCore intrinsics and depth refer to the ARCore session stream, not Camera2 camera_id 0 at 4000×3000.
Depth is lower resolution than the camera preview and is letterboxed (not pixel-aligned). Use Smoothed for denser coverage; Raw is sparse by design.
Raw depth covers only ~%1$.0f%% of pixels — patches are normal. Try Smoothed source.
